StmtSimple.StatementText: (@P0 int,@P1 int,@P2 int,@P3 int,@P4 int)select ut.*, District.Name DistrictName, District.DistrictCode, right('00000' + convert(varchar(16),Users.CometId),5) + ' - ' + isnull(Users.Attention,'') UsersAttention, isnull(School.Name,'') UsersSchool, ApprovalLevels.Description ApprovalLevelDescription, case isnull(ut.ApproverId,0) when 0 then case ut.Level when 0 then 'Not Attached to Approval Tree' when 1 then 'None' else 'Broken Approval Tree' end else right('00000' + convert(varchar(16),Approvers.CometId),5) + ' - ' + isnull(Approvers.Attention,'') + case when isnull(Approvers.Active,0) = 0 then ' (Inactive)' else '' end + char(13) + char(10) + ' of ' + isnull(ApproversSchool.Name,'') end ApproversAttention, Accounts.Code, case ss.UseAllocations when 1 then 'Yes' else 'No' end UsesAllocations, case ss.UseAllocations when 1 then convert(varchar(32),convert(decimal(11,2),isnull(ss.AllocationAmount,0))) else convert(decimal(11,2),0.00)/*'No Allocations'*/ end AllocationAmount, ShipLocations.Name ShippingLocation, Users.DistrictAcctgCode, ShipLocations.LocationCode, case isnull(Users.AllowIncidentals,0) when 0 then '' else 'Incidentals' end as AllowIncidentals, isnull(Users.Email,'') Email from dbo.uf_UserTreeBudgetFiltered( @P0 , @P1 , @P2 ) ut join Users on Users.UserId = ut.UserId join ShipLocations on ShipLocations.ShippingId = Users.ShippingId join School on School.SchoolId = Users.SchoolId join District on District.DistrictId = Users.DistrictId join Budgets on Budgets.BudgetId = case @P3 when 0 then (select top 1 BudgetId from Budgets b1 where b1.DistrictId = District.DistrictId order by b1.StartDate desc) else @P4 end left outer join ApprovalLevels on ApprovalLevels.ApprovalLevel = Users.ApprovalLevel left outer join Users Approvers on Approvers.UserId = ut.ApproverId left outer join School ApproversSchool on ApproversSchool.SchoolId = Approvers.SchoolId left outer join ( (select Users.UserId, Budgets.BudgetId, Accounts.AccountId, UserAccounts.UseAllocations, UserAccounts.AllocationAmount from Accounts join UserAccounts on UserAccounts.AccountId = Accounts.AccountId and UserAccounts.Active = 1 join Budgets on Budgets.BudgetId = UserAccounts.BudgetId and Budgets.Active = 1 join BudgetAccounts on BudgetAccounts.BudgetAccountId = UserAccounts.BudgetAccountId and BudgetAccounts.Active = 1 join Users on Users.UserId = UserAccounts.UserId and Users.Active = 1 where Accounts.Active = 1) ) ss on ss.UserId = Users.UserId and ss.BudgetId = Budgets.BudgetId left outer join Accounts on Accounts.AccountId = ss.AccountId order by District.DistrictCode, ut.DistrictId, ut.Status desc, ApproversSchool.Name, ut.Level, ut.ApproverId, School.Name, Users.CometId, Accounts.Code

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [Expr1041]=(0) THEN CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[uf_UserTreeBudgetFiltered].[Level] as [ut].[Level]=(0) THEN 'Not Attached to Approval Tree' ELSE CASE WHEN [EDS].[dbo].[uf_UserTreeBudgetFiltered].[Level] as [ut].[Level]=(1) THEN 'None' ELSE 'Broken Approval Tree' END END ELSE right('00000'+CONVERT(varchar(16),[EDS].[dbo].[Users].[CometId] as [Approvers].[CometId],0),(5))+' - '+isnull([EDS].[dbo].[Users].[Attention] as [Approvers].[Attention],'')+CASE WHEN isnull([EDS].[dbo].[Users].[Active] as [Approvers].[Active],(0))=(0) THEN ' (Inactive)' ELSE '' END+' '+' '+' of '+isnull([EDS].[dbo].[School].[Name] as [ApproversSchool].[Name],'') END
